title: payena macrophylla
intro: Payena macrophylla, also known as the large-leaved payena, is a species of plant in the family Sapotaceae, native to Southeast Asia. The medicinal properties of Payena macrophylla are attributed to its leaves, bark, and seeds, which contain flavonoids, alkaloids, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Payena macrophylla include its antidiabetic, antimicrobial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments such as fever, skin infections, and digestive issues. Payena macrophylla can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
